title: Application to Visa Process Steps for Spain

processSteps.label: University Application with Apostilled docs (25-50 euros/application)
Offer Letter : With program details and fees
bullets: Tuition Fees 700–6000 euro (Varies program to program)
Initial Deposit for Seat Confirmation (A portion of Tuition Fees)

processSteps.label: Police clearance certificate : From Ministry of Home Affairs, 1500 BDT
Show Fund : (700 euros/month of 1 year) + Rest Tuition Fees

costSteps.label: Translation in Spanish : Per page 200-300 BDT
Visa Fee (D) : 90 euro   |   BLS Fee : 2500 BDT
